settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace?
settings.syncRecommended: Please sync now to apply settings

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get an overview of your project's health at a glance. Click on cards or charts to view detailed lists.
dashboard.descriptionMyIssues: Showing the status of issues assigned to you. Click on cards or charts to see detailed lists.
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Start by registering your Backlog domain and API key in the settings. Once you sync your projects, the dashboard will display your issue status.
dashboard.noIssues: No issues found. Go to Settings to sync.
dashboard.overdueTooltip: Number of issues past their due date. Click to view the list.
dashboard.dueSoonTooltip: Number of issues due within the next 3 days. Click to view the list.
dashboard.stagnantTooltip: Number of incomplete issues not updated for 5+ days. Click to view the list.
dashboard.statusDistributionDescription: Shows the number of issues for each status. Click on the chart to view the list for that status.
dashboard.priorityDistributionDescription: Shows the number of issues for each priority. Click on the chart to view the list for that priority.
dashboard.recentUpdatesDescription: Shows the 5 most recently updated issues. Click to open in browser.
dashboard.delayRiskDescription: Issues with AI-analyzed delay risk. Click to view details and suggested actions.

reports.title: Reports / Summary
reports.description: Review a cross-project status summary and weekly/monthly activity in one place.
reports.noWorkspace: No enabled workspace. Enable a workspace in Settings.

period.title: Weekly / Monthly Activity
period.completedCaveat: Completed counts include only closed issues imported within the configured corpus window (closures outside that window are not counted).

degraded.aiUnavailable: AI is unavailable, so the summary text cannot be shown (statistics are still displayed).
degraded.notGenerated: Summary text has not been generated yet. Click "Regenerate".
degraded.loadFailed: Failed to load the report. Please try again later.

degraded.aiUnavailable: AI features are unavailable, so the solution summary cannot be shown (the list of similar issues is still displayed).
degraded.embeddingNotReady: Search data for this issue is still being built. Please try again later.
degraded.searchFailed: Similar search failed. Please try again later.

availability.deviceNotEligible: This device does not support AI features
availability.alternativeBackend: An alternative backend (MLX) will be available in a future update

tooltip.generated: This content was generated by AI

banner.title: Want to try the AI assistant?
banner.description: Automatically summarize issues and analyze delay risks with on-device AI.

corpus.title: Similarity Search Corpus (Closed Issues)
corpus.monthsHint: Changing the period will re-import the corpus on the next sync (max 24 months).
corpus.embeddingHint: Building embedding data in the background. Similarity search will be available once complete.
